title: Time Needed to Rearrange a Binary String
titleCn: 二进制字符串重新安排顺序需要的时间

testcases.input: s = "0110101" Output: 4 Explanation: After one second, s becomes "1011010". After another second, s becomes "1101100". After the third second, s becomes "1110100". After the fourth second, s becomes "1111000". No occurrence of "01" exists any longer, and the process needed 4 seconds to complete, so we return 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: After one second, s becomes "1011010". After another second, s becomes "1101100". After the third second, s becomes "1110100". After the fourth second, s becomes "1111000". No occurrence of "01" exists any longer, and the process needed 4 seconds to complete, so we return 4.

testcases.input: s = "11100" Output: 0 Explanation: No occurrence of "01" exists in s, and the processes needed 0 seconds to complete, so we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No occurrence of "01" exists in s, and the processes needed 0 seconds to complete, so we return 0.
